emailStep.title: Welcome
emailStep.description: Enter your QQ email to continue.
emailStep.qqHint: Enter your QQ number only. We'll add @qq.com and show your available sign-in options next.
emailStep.noAccount: No account yet? Click here to

registration.errorMessage: We couldn't create your account. Please check the email and try again.
registration.successMessage: Check your email for the login link.

methodsStep.title: Welcome
methodsStep.description: Choose how you want to continue.

passwordLogin.errorMessage: Please check your email and password

passwordlessLogin.successMessage: Check your email for the login link
passwordlessLogin.errorMessage: Please check your email and try again

passkeyLogin.errorMessage: We couldn't verify your passkey. Please try again or use another method.

legal.agreement: By clicking continue, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

flash.setPasswordDescription: Create a password or passkey in your account settings.

fallback.title: Something went wrong
fallback.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

400.title: Bad request
400.description: The request was invalid. Please check and try again.

401.title: Sign in required
401.description: Please sign in to access this page.

403.title: Access denied
403.description: You don't have permission to view this page.

404.title: Page not found
404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

500.title: Server error
500.description: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

groups.title: Group Management
groups.description: Review visible groups, inspect members, and control where DianBot is enabled.

list.title: Groups
list.description: Find the groups you need and review their bot status at a glance.

empty.title: No groups found
empty.description: Adjust the filters to find another group.

error.title: Groups could not be loaded
error.description: Refresh the list or try again in a moment.

details.noSelection: Select a group to view details.

error.title: Group details could not be loaded
error.description: Refresh the group details or try again in a moment.

settings.title: Bot availability
settings.description: Enable this group to allow bot commands and push notifications.
settings.adminOnlyDescription: Only group admins can change bot availability.

update.errorMessage: Could not update group settings. Please try again.

preview.title: No Steam account linked
preview.description: Bind a Steam account for this member to show profile details and current game activity here.
preview.error: Could not load this Steam profile right now.

bindDialog.title: Bind Steam for {{member}}
bindDialog.description: Look up a Steam account and link it to this group member.

rebindDialog.title: Rebind Steam for {{member}}
rebindDialog.description: Look up another Steam account to replace this member's current binding.

empty.title: No members found
empty.description: Adjust the filters to find another member.

monitor.title: Live Monitor
monitor.description: Real-time Steam online status across all enabled groups.
monitor.previewError: Could not load this Steam profile right now.

empty.title: No enabled groups
empty.description: Enable at least one group to start monitoring Steam activity.

error.title: Could not load groups
error.description: Please try again in a moment.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.description: Manage sign-in methods, account security, and connected gaming accounts.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected Accounts
connectedAccounts.description: Link external gaming accounts used for status tracking and activity features.

accountSecurity.title: Account Security
accountSecurity.description: Update credentials and sign-in methods that protect access to your account.

password.title: Password
password.description: Set a password for email and password sign-in.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 12 characters.
validation.passwordMax: Password must be at most 72 characters.
validation.confirmationMin: Confirmation must be at least 12 characters.
validation.confirmationMax: Confirmation must be at most 72 characters.

update.errorMessage: We couldn't update your password. Please check it and try again.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Use device biometrics, security keys, or password managers to sign in faster.

empty.title: No passkeys yet
empty.description: Add a passkey to sign in without typing your password.

error.title: Passkeys could not be loaded
error.description: Refresh the list or try again in a moment.

addDialog.title: Add passkey
addDialog.description: Name this passkey before starting browser registration.
addDialog.label: Passkey name
addDialog.helper: Name your passkey so you can recognise it later.

rename.errorMessage: Could not rename passkey. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete passkey?
delete.description: This will remove {{label}} from your account.
delete.errorMessage: Could not delete passkey. Please try again.

steam.title: Steam Account
steam.description: Link your Steam account to enable game status tracking and notifications.

notBound.title: No Steam account linked
notBound.description: Link your Steam account to see your profile here.

error.title: Steam profile could not be loaded

bind.title: Link Steam Account
bind.description: Enter your 17-digit Steam ID to look up and link your account.

steamId.label: Steam ID
steamId.regexError: Must be a valid Steam ID starting with 7656.

bind.lookupError: Could not find a Steam profile for this ID. Please check and try again.
bind.lookupServiceError: Could not look up this Steam profile right now. Please try again.
bind.successMessage: Your Steam account has been linked successfully.
bind.errorMessage: Could not link Steam account. Please try again.

unbind.title: Unlink Steam Account
unbind.description: This will remove the link between your account and Steam. You can link again anytime.
unbind.successMessage: Your Steam account has been unlinked successfully.
unbind.errorMessage: Could not unlink Steam account. Please try again.

system.title: System Settings
system.description: Configure global system settings and view system status.

globalConfig.title: Global Configuration
globalConfig.content: Configure global settings for the application.

superadmin.title: Superadmin
superadmin.content: The superadmin has full access to all system settings and user management features.

userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.content: Access user management features to view user accounts and manage permissions.

permissions.title: Permission Management
permissions.description: Understand and manage user roles and permissions.

roles.title: User Roles
roles.description: The system uses a hierarchical role model for access control.

superadmin.title: Superadmin
superadmin.description: Full system access. First registered user becomes superadmin automatically.

groupAdmin.title: Group Admin
groupAdmin.description: Can manage Steam bindings and group settings for their groups.

user.title: Regular User
user.description: Can view groups they belong to and manage their own Steam account.

registration.title: Registration Policy
registration.description: Control who can register for an account.
registration.content: Users can register if they are members of an enabled group. The first user to register automatically becomes the superadmin.

export.title: Data Export
export.description: Export system data as CSV files for backup or analysis.

users.title: User Data
users.content: Download a CSV file containing user IDs, email addresses, confirmation status, and registration dates.

groups.title: Group Settings
groups.content: Download a CSV file containing group IDs, enabled status, and last update timestamps.

steamPlayers.title: Steam Bindings
steamPlayers.content: Download a CSV file containing QQ IDs, Steam IDs, and binding timestamps.

date.min: Date must not be before the minimum.
date.max: Date must not be after the maximum.
